channel.title: Photography on Tanay Tummalapalli
channel.description: Recent content in Photography on Tanay Tummalapalli

item.title: stonejuna
item.description: I was roaming around in Anjuna looking for a spot to catch the sunset. Unfortunately, the beach was too crowded with psytrance blasting from most beach shacks. I hate psytrance. A fair bit of walking led me to rocks south of Shiva Valley. The rocks blew me away. I had never seen such an extensive network of rocks next to a beach. The low tide probably exposed the rocks which would have been underwater otherwise.
